entries.source:
Chat Edit: '2. Native Inference Engine Implementation (Core - High Priority)
 Replace ggml with Native Quantized Inference:
Implement GGUFLoader natively: Parse GGUF files using std::ifstream and manual byte reading.
Add native quantization kernels (Q4_0, Q8_0) in MASM x64 (see suite's compression/hierarchical_quant.asm).
Implement matrix multiplication in pure MASM (extend inference/vulkan_mm.cpp to DirectX 12).
 Tokenizer Overhaul:
Replace any external tokenizer with pure MASM SSE4.2 implementation (from suite: inference/tokenizer_masm.asm).
Implement BPE merge table natively in C++20 std::unordered_map.
 Speculative Decoding:
Implement draft/target model logic natively (from suite: inference/speculative_decoder.hpp).
Use native threads (std::thread) for parallel verification.
 KV Cache:
Implement sliding window KV cache with native SVD compression (from suite: inference/sliding_kv_cache.hpp).
Use std::array and manual math for projections.'

Chat Edit: 'enhanced to be useable by custom compilers made yesterday/last night as I have a cleanly compiled x64 masm from scratch non dep or microsoft'
